title: A summer afternoon at Grandma's
content: A summer afternoon at my grandmother's house, the smell of cookies, sunlight through lace curtains

title: Last day of school
content: Walking home alone after the last day of school, golden hour, cicadas humming

title: Rainy day
content: A rainy night in Sydney, neon reflections on wet pavement, feeling free and small

title: Beach day
content: The beach at dawn before anyone arrived, cold sand, fog rolling in from the sea
